### ⚠️ IMPORTANT: DO NOT OPEN A PUBLIC ISSUE FOR VULNERABILITIES

To preserve system integrity and prevent malicious exploitation of active credentials, we strictly prohibit public disclosures of security vulnerabilities.

If you have detected an active credential leak, a logic vulnerability, or a script injection flaw:

1. **Do not submit this issue form.**
2. Refer to our [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/im-ismail-ibne-ratul/portfolio/blob/main/SECURITY.md) guidelines immediately.
3. Package your findings (endpoint, Proof of Concept payload, and recommendation) into an encrypted email.
4. Dispatch your findings directly to the Security Response team: **im.ismail.ibna.ratul@gmail.com**.

Thank you for helping us maintain a secure cyberspace perimeter!
